tldr_zh: OpenAI推AI工作轉型報告、South Korea投資1兆美元晶片及機器人，Anthropic與加州政府達成協議。
tldr_en: OpenAI reports AI job transitions, South Korea invests $1T in chips and robots, Anthropic partners with California.

items.title_zh: OpenAI發布歐洲AI工作轉型報告
items.title_en: OpenAI Releases Report on AI Workforce Transition in Europe
items.summary_zh: OpenAI發布新報告，分析AI如何重塑歐盟各行業就業格局，展示哪些職業面臨自動化、增長或工作流程變化。這是重要的政策研究，有助於指導各國應對AI帶來的勞動力轉變。
items.summary_en: OpenAI released a new report mapping how AI will reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes. This policy research helps guide countries in preparing for AI-driven labor market transitions.

items.title_zh: AI代理不是同事，企業應重新定義人機協作
items.title_en: AI Agents Are Not Your Coworkers: Redefining AI's Role
items.summary_zh: MIT Tech Review評論指出，企業將AI工具標籤化為「員工」存在誤導性，強調AI代理與真正的同事有本質區別。隨著企業投資AI代理以實現商業目標，理解其限制與能力邊界變得至關重要。
items.summary_en: MIT Tech Review argues that labeling AI tools as 'coworkers' is misleading, emphasizing fundamental differences between AI agents and actual employees. As enterprises invest in agentic AI for ROI, understanding its limitations is critical.

items.title_zh: Anthropic與加州政府達成協議，Claude享半價優惠
items.title_en: Anthropic Partners with California, Offering Claude at 50% Discount
items.summary_zh: Anthropic與加州政府合作，允許州政府機構以半價使用Claude AI。這反映了OpenAI競爭對手與政府的關係升溫，同時也表明聯邦政府對OpenAI態度轉變。
items.summary_en: Anthropic forged a deal with California allowing state government agencies to use Claude at half price. This signals warming relations between the OpenAI rival and state authorities, while signaling federal tensions with OpenAI.

items.title_zh: South Korea投資1兆美元發展晶片與人形機器人
items.title_en: South Korea Invests $1 Trillion in Memory Chips and Humanoid Robots
items.summary_zh: South Korea宣布投入1兆美元用於記憶體晶片生產與人形機器人開發，目標在2028年前實現商業化的人形機器人。此舉彰顯South Korea在AI時代搶占技術領導地位的決心。
items.summary_en: South Korea announced $1 trillion investment in memory chip production and humanoid robot development, targeting commercial robotic solutions by 2028. This positions South Korea as a leader in AI infrastructure and physical AI development.

items.title_zh: iPhone 18 Pro設計圖洩露至暗網，蘋果供應商遭駭
items.title_en: iPhone 18 Pro Images Leaked on Dark Web Following Supplier Breach
items.summary_zh: 洩露的iPhone 18 Pro照片及零件清單出現在暗網，起源於蘋果一家關鍵供應商的資料洩露事件。洩露的設計顯示三鏡頭配置與蘋果標誌。
items.summary_en: Leaked iPhone 18 Pro photos and parts lists appeared on the dark web following a data breach at an Apple supplier. The leaked images show a three-camera layout and Apple logo design.

items.title_zh: Google警告EU反壟斷計畫可能危害用戶隱私
items.title_en: Google Warns EU's Antitrust Plans Could Expose User Data
items.summary_zh: Google警告歐盟要求分享搜尋數據與開放Android AI的反壟斷計畫，存在重大隱私風險。這反映科技巨頭與監管機構在創新與隱私保護間的持續衝突。
items.summary_en: Google warned that EU's antitrust plans to share search data with competitors and open AI on Android pose major privacy risks. This highlights ongoing tensions between tech giants and regulators over innovation and privacy protection.

items.title_zh: 美國懸賞1000萬美元破獲Signal和WhatsApp駭客組織
items.title_en: US Offers $10 Million Bounty for Info on Signal and WhatsApp Hackers
items.summary_zh: 美國政府懸賞1000萬美元尋求俄羅斯駭客組織的線索，該組織自2026年3月起持續駭客Signal和WhatsApp。這反映美國對國家級駭客威脅的重視。
items.summary_en: The US government offered $10 million for information on Russian-state backed hackers behind Signal and WhatsApp hacking operations ongoing since March 2026. This reflects serious concerns about state-sponsored cyber threats.

items.title_zh: Tidal禁止AI生成音樂盈利，但允許上線標籤提示
items.title_en: Tidal Bans Monetization of AI-Generated Music with Labeling System
items.summary_zh: Tidal推出新政策將AI生成音樂標籤化，從7月15日起將無法獲利，但允許這類音樂上線。這是音樂平台在版權保護與創新間的平衡嘗試。
items.summary_en: Tidal launched new policies labeling AI-generated music and making them unmono tizable starting July 15, while still allowing them on the platform. This balances artist protection with openness to innovation.

items.title_zh: Qwen 3.6 27B模型成本地開發最佳選擇
items.title_en: Qwen 3.6 27B Becomes Sweet Spot for Local AI Development
items.summary_zh: 社群討論顯示Qwen 3.6 27B版本在本地開發中表現優異，已成為開發者首選。這反映開源模型在實用性上與大型專有模型的競爭加劇。
items.summary_en: Community discussion reveals Qwen 3.6 27B has become the preferred choice for local development. This reflects intensifying competition between open-source and proprietary models in practical applications.

items.title_zh: pgAdmin 4發布安全更新，修補7個漏洞
items.title_en: pgAdmin 4 Releases Security Update Patching 7 Vulnerabilities
items.summary_zh: PostgreSQL管理工具pgAdmin 4發布9.16版，修補可能導致認證洩露和遠端程式碼執行的7個安全漏洞。由於pgAdmin權限高，用戶應立即更新。
items.summary_en: pgAdmin 4 released version 9.16 patching 7 security vulnerabilities including credential leaks and remote code execution risks. Users should update immediately due to pgAdmin's high privilege level.

items.title_zh: 美國與伊朗互相指責後同意"暫停"，緩解區域緊張
items.title_en: US and Iran Agree to 'Stand Down' After Retaliatory Strikes
items.summary_zh: 美國和伊朗週末互相攻擊後，同意暫停升級行動。雙方各自聲稱他們已停止報復，這有助於舒緩中東局勢緊張。
items.summary_en: US and Iran agreed to 'stand down' following weekend exchanges of strikes, with each claiming they've halted retaliation. This helps de-escalate regional tensions in the Middle East.

items.title_zh: 秘魯總統大選次輪計票完成，藤森惠子微幅勝選
items.title_en: Peru's Presidential Election: Fujimori Narrowly Wins Second Round
items.summary_zh: 秘魯6月7日舉行總統大選第2輪投票，選務單位完成計票後，保守派候選人藤森惠子以極小領先幅度獲勝。
items.summary_en: Peru completed the count of the presidential election's second round held on June 7, with conservative candidate Keiko Fujimori winning by a narrow margin.
